mapper.select: SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_config_sms t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_dept t2 ON t.create_dept = t2.id LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_post t3 ON t.create_post = t3.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
